data.title: Syneron Bio Announces Completion of $150 Million Series B Financing
data.description:
Syneron Bio Announces Completion of $150 Million Series B Financing

Syneron Bio Announces Completion of $150 Million Series B Financing

PR Newswire

BEIJING, April 3, 2026

BEIJING, April 3, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- Syneron Bio, a leader in intelligent platform-driven macrocyclic peptide drug discovery, announced the successful closing of its Series B financing on March 31th. The round was led by an international life-science fund, with co-lead participation from Decheng Capital, and CDH VGC. Additional investors included a wholly owned subsidiary of the Abu Dhabi Investment Authority ("ADIA"), True Light Capital, — an independent, wholly-owned subsidiary of Temasek, Qiming Venture Partners, BioTrack Capital and well known industrial investors. Existing shareholders, including AstraZeneca, LAV, Sinovation Capital, 5Y Capital, GL Ventures, Biotech Development Fund and Lenovo Capital,  among others, also continued their support.

Proceeds from this financing will be primarily used to further advance the intelligent evolution of the company's proprietary macrocyclic peptide discovery platform, Synova™, and to accelerate the progression of its diversified innovative pipeline into clinical development.

Dr. Frank Zhang, Founder and Chief Executive Officer of Syneron Bio, commented:

"We are honored to receive support and recognition in this financing round from a distinguished group of leading global healthcare funds, tech venture capitals, reputable multi-national corporations, and prominent sovereign wealth funds. The completion of this financing further strengthens our cash position, enabling us to accelerate the development of multiple core pipeline programs across oncology, autoimmune, metabolic, and rare diseases, with the goal of benefiting patients worldwide. At the same time, our high-throughput, intelligence-driven Synova™ platform will continue to scale and evolve, significantly improving the efficiency and success rate of macrocyclic peptide drug discovery. With the continued support of our capital and industry partners, we look forward to delivering innovative therapies and addressing critical unmet medical needs for patients around the globe."

Contact Person: Corrine.Chan
Email: public@syneronbio.com
Website: https://www.syneronbio.com/
Telephone:1801606886
Company: Syneron Bio
City: Beijing

View original content:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/syneron-bio-announces-completion-of-150-million-series-b-financing-302733591.html

SOURCE Syneron Bio

data.title: iQIYI Launches Nadou Pro, China's First AI Agent for Professional Film and TV Production
data.description:
iQIYI Launches Nadou Pro, China's First AI Agent for Professional Film and TV Production

iQIYI Launches Nadou Pro, China's First AI Agent for Professional Film and TV Production

PR Newswire

BEIJING, April 3, 2026

BEIJING, April 3, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- On March 30, 2026, iQIYI, China's leading online entertainment platform, launched Nadou Pro — the country's first AI agent built specifically for professional film and TV production. Now in pre-commercial release, the agent marks iQIYI's latest move to integrate AI across the entertainment production pipeline.

Nadou Pro combines leading foundation models with iQIYI's production expertise, supporting end-to-end workflows from script development and storyboarding to final output. One of its standout features is "blockbuster prompts", which translate abstract creative concepts into production-ready cinematic direction.

Wenfeng LIU, senior vice president of iQIYI, said: "Nadou Pro is built specifically for AI creators and filmmakers, integrating creation, production, and distribution into one seamless, intelligent workflow. Our goal is simple: to make AI the most powerful creative engine in professional filmmaking—where imagination is the only limit."

Solving Long-Form AI Content's Quality Gap
While AI can readily produce short-form videos within 30 seconds, creating long-form narratives at professional drama and film quality remains an industry challenge. Nadou Pro addresses this by combining vast content assets with proprietary algorithms that embed professional cinematic production methods into every workflow stage. Creators use natural language to access extensive resources for character design, shot composition, and narrative development, producing AI-generated stories that approach live-action quality.

Nadou Pro also streamlines production by integrating multiple AI models into one platform. Combining iQIYI's proprietary QiZhi multimodal large models with third-party AI models -including SeeDance, Kling, Vidu, Hailuo, and WAN – it supports text, image, video, and audio generation without switching between platforms. Specialized agents for screenwriting, art direction, storyboarding, and visual effects reflect the structured workflows of traditional content production.

Early Validation from Filmmakers
Since internal testing began in late 2025, Nadou Pro has supported iQIYI's teams and partners across film, drama, and animation projects. For example, "Peter Pau × iQIYI AI Theater," an initiative co-launched with Academy Award-winning cinematographer Mr. Peter Pau, gave directors early access to the platform. All 16 upcoming works were created using Nadou Pro, spanning science fiction, fantasy, historical drama, and contemporary genres.

Filmmakers have validated the platform's commercial production capabilities. Fangzhao ZHUANG, director of "Celestial Quest," which premiered on iQIYI's Chinese mainland platform and iQIYI International on March 31, credited Nadou Pro's character design, scene creation, and storyboard tools for achieving the film's apocalyptic mecha aesthetic.

iQIYI continues developing its AI-generated content ecosystem through initiatives including the 2025 Global Short Film Creation Competition, "Peter Pau × iQIYI AI Theater," and the "Nadou AIGC Venture Conference." The launch of Nadou Pro reinforces iQIYI's position in AI-driven content production as the entertainment industry undergoes technological transformation.

Contact: iQIYI Press, press@qiyi.com

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/iqiyi-launches-nadou-pro-chinas-first-ai-agent-for-professional-film-and-tv-production-302733585.html

SOURCE iQIYI Inc.

data.title: EU Industrial Chocolate Market to Reach USD 29.40 Billion by 2036 | Barry Callebaut, Cargill, Olam Cocoa Lead Market Growth
data.description:
EU industrial chocolate demand grows steadily, driven by bakery and confectionery sectors, sustainability compliance, and strong presence of leading global processors.

NEWARK, DE / ACCESS Newswire / April 3, 2026 / Future Market Insights (FMI) projects that the Demand for Industrial Chocolate in the EU is entering a structurally resilient growth phase as large-scale food manufacturing sectors sustain procurement volumes despite ongoing cocoa price volatility. Industrial bakery, confectionery, and dairy processors continue to anchor baseline demand, while increasing cost pressures linked to cocoa bean price fluctuations on ICE Futures Europe are reshaping procurement strategies toward shorter contract cycles and diversified sourcing.

In 2025, the Demand for Industrial Chocolate in the EU was valued at USD 18.50 billion. According to FMI, the market is expected to reach USD 19.30 billion in 2026 and further expand to USD 29.40 billion by 2036, progressing at a CAGR of 4.3% during the forecast period.

The projected expansion reflects the category's supply-chain-intensive nature, where regulatory compliance, cocoa origin diversification, and vertical integration are becoming central to maintaining margins and ensuring consistent supply across European food manufacturing operations.

Request Your Sample Now - Unlock Growth Potential and Discover Key Market Opportunities!
https://www.futuremarketinsights.com/reports/sample/rep-gb-27192

Demand for Industrial Chocolate in EU Market Snapshot

  • Market Value (2025): USD 18.50 Billion

  • Forecast Value (2036): USD 29.40 Billion

  • Forecast CAGR (2026-2036): 4.3%

  • Leading Product Type: Cocoa Butter (42.3% share)

  • Top Application: Bakery (56.6% share)

  • Leading Distribution Channel: Specialty Distributors (45% share)

Cocoa Price Volatility and Regulatory Compliance Reshaping Procurement

A key factor influencing market dynamics is the rising volatility in cocoa bean prices traded on ICE Futures Europe, which is increasing cost-of-goods pressures across the EU chocolate ingredients supply chain. Procurement teams are responding by renegotiating supply contracts on shorter cycles and prioritizing supplier diversification to reduce risk exposure.

Simultaneously, stringent regulatory frameworks such as Directive 2000/36/EC and Regulation (EU) No 1169/2011 are enforcing strict standards on cocoa composition, labeling, and traceability. The introduction of the EU Deforestation Regulation (EUDR) is further accelerating the shift toward origin-certified cocoa sourcing, narrowing supplier pools and increasing compliance costs.

These regulatory and pricing pressures are reinforcing the competitive advantage of vertically integrated processors capable of managing traceability, sustainability compliance, and supply stability at scale.

Bakery and Confectionery Segments Sustain Core Demand

Industrial chocolate demand remains strongly anchored in bakery applications, which account for 56.6% of total consumption in 2026. Large-scale production of bread, pastries, and cakes continues to drive bulk procurement of cocoa butter, cocoa liquor, and compound chocolate.

Confectionery manufacturers are also increasing cocoa usage intensity as formulations shift toward higher cocoa content products, supporting incremental demand growth across the value chain.

Industrial chocolate is widely used across:

  • Bakery manufacturing (bread, pastries, cakes)

  • Confectionery production (bars, pralines, fillings)

  • Dairy and frozen dessert applications

  • Food service and specialty culinary uses

The sustained growth is supported by rising consumer preference for premium chocolate products and increasing emphasis on ingredient quality, flavor complexity, and ethical sourcing.

Cocoa Butter and Liquid Formats Drive Functional Efficiency

From a product standpoint, cocoa butter leads the market with a 42.3% share, supported by its critical role in premium chocolate production, texture optimization, and compliance with EU composition standards.

Its advantages include:

  • Superior melting characteristics and texture control

  • High compatibility with premium chocolate formulations

  • Strong alignment with regulatory quality standards

In terms of distribution, specialty distributors dominate with a 45% share, leveraging strong relationships with food manufacturers and providing technical support, quality assurance, and consistent supply.

Direct supply agreements and B2B online platforms are also gaining traction, particularly among large-scale processors seeking cost efficiencies and streamlined procurement.

Country-Level Growth Reflects Diverse Market Maturity

The EU industrial chocolate market demonstrates stable but differentiated growth across key countries:

  • Spain: 4.5% CAGR

  • Netherlands: 4.4% CAGR

  • Italy: 4.2% CAGR

  • Germany: 4.1% CAGR

  • France: 4.0% CAGR

Spain leads growth due to its expanding confectionery export sector and increasing bakery ingredient demand. The Netherlands benefits from advanced processing infrastructure and strong re-export capabilities. Germany and France, while mature markets, continue to anchor demand through large-scale consumption and established manufacturing bases.

Competitive Landscape Focused on Scale, Integration, and Sustainability

The market is highly competitive, with leading players focusing on supply chain integration, sustainable sourcing, and processing innovation to maintain market share.

Key companies operating in the market include:

  • Cargill Cocoa & Chocolate

  • Barry Callebaut

  • Olam Cocoa

  • ADM Cocoa

  • Mondelez International

  • Mars Wrigley

  • Ferrero Group

  • Lindt & Sprüngli

  • Valrhona

  • European regional processors

Strategic priorities include expanding European processing capacity, strengthening direct sourcing partnerships, investing in traceability systems, and aligning with sustainability certifications such as Fair Trade and Rainforest Alliance.

Market Outlook: Sustainability, Traceability, and Premiumization to Drive Growth

The outlook for the EU industrial chocolate market remains steady as structural demand from food manufacturing continues to provide a strong foundation. However, future growth will be increasingly shaped by:

  • Sustainable and deforestation-free cocoa sourcing

  • Advanced traceability and transparency systems

  • Premium ingredient positioning and higher cocoa content formulations

  • Technological innovation in processing and quality enhancement

As regulatory scrutiny intensifies and consumer expectations evolve, industrial chocolate suppliers that can deliver consistent quality, verified sourcing, and operational efficiency will be best positioned to capture long-term growth opportunities through 2036.

For an in-depth analysis of evolving formulation trends and to access the complete strategic outlook for the Demand for Industrial Chocolate in EU through 2036, Full Report Request - https://www.futuremarketinsights.com/reports/demand-for-industrial-chocolate-in-eu

data.title: DOJO PUREX 60K Debuts at TPE 2026 as the World's First INSTA-JUICED™ Vape
data.description:
DOJO PUREX 60K Debuts at TPE 2026 as the World's First INSTA-JUICED™ Vape

DOJO PUREX 60K Debuts at TPE 2026 as the World's First INSTA-JUICED™ Vape

PR Newswire

LAS VEGAS, April 3, 2026

LAS VEGAS, April 3, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- DOJO, powered by VAPORESSO, showcased its latest innovations at TPE 2026 (Total Product Expo) in Las Vegas. The lineup was led by the debut of PUREX 60K, the world's first INSTA-JUICED™ vape, alongside the SPHERE S 40K, which continues to expand the brand's design-driven portfolio. Together, the two products highlight DOJO's evolving approach to addressing core performance challenges while refining everyday usability.

Addressing the industry challenges of flavor degradation and leakage, PUREX 60K adopts a patented INSTA-JUICED™ technology. By keeping the e-liquid hermetically sealed away from the coil until activation, it prevents oxidation for a consistently fresh flavor. This design also helps reduce leakage risks during transport and daily use. With a simple push to start, users can enjoy fresh and juicy flavor from the first puff to the last.

Built in the United States, the PUREX 60K is crafted to high international standards, combining premium American e-liquid, enhanced stability and a reliable supply chain to deliver consistent quality and exceptional performance that partners and consumers can trust.

In daily operation, the mega clear tank allows users to check e-liquid levels easily, while a digital display provides clear battery status. Beyond its structural design, PUREX 60K also delivers improvements in overall performance. It increases e-liquid utilization by approximately 20 percent, supporting up to 60,000 puffs. A 1000mAh battery provides stable output for extended sessions. Two operating modes offer flexibility: ECO mode extends battery life for longer-lasting use, while SMART mode adjusts power output in real time to personalize each puff for a fuller, richer vape experience.

Alongside PUREX 60K, DOJO also presented the SPHERE S 40K. With its translucent leather and shimmering starlight design, the device combines futuristic aesthetics with intelligent performance. Built for extreme longevity, the device supports up to 40,000 puffs across its SMART and ECO modes. To power this massive capacity, a 1000mAh rechargeable battery ensures stable output, while an HD LED screen provides real-time tracking of both e-liquid and power levels.

TPE 2026 marks a step forward for DOJO as it continues to refine both technology and user experience. While the PUREX 60K addresses core demands for freshness and reliability, the SPHERE S 40K showcases the brand's mastery of aesthetics and smart features. Together, these advancements reflect DOJO's long-term commitment to maintaining a competitive edge through continuous technological innovation and meaningful product differentiation.

About DOJO

DOJO is dedicated to enhancing the vaping experience by crafting superior quality products, guided by the "Create & Share" philosophy. Existing for vapers, DOJO is driven by innovation, committed to high-end quality, and focused on a consumer-centered approach.

View original content to download multimedia:https://www.prnewswire.com/news-releases/dojo-purex-60k-debuts-at-tpe-2026-as-the-worlds-first-insta-juiced-vape-302733578.html

SOURCE DOJO

data.title: Mexedia S.p.A. Società Benefit: Management Discipline and Operational Approach in the Group’s Evolution Path
data.description:
Mexedia S.p.A. Società Benefit: Management Discipline and Operational Approach in the Group’s Evolution Path

Regulatory News:

Mexedia S.p.A. Società Benefit (Euronext Growth Paris: ALMEX, ISIN: IT0005450819), as part of the evolution path initiated in 2024 and continued in 2025, confirms its commitment to strengthening management discipline and adopting an operational approach focused on efficiency, quality of activities and long-term sustainability.

During the last financial year, the Group implemented a set of actions aimed at streamlining its operating perimeter and progressively increasing its focus on core activities, with the objective of improving the quality of revenues and the overall economic and financial profile.

This approach translated into greater attention to the selection of operating initiatives, optimization of the cost structure and management of working capital, in line with the evidence emerging from the 2025 financial results.

The path undertaken is based on continuity in execution and a prudent management approach, with the aim of progressively strengthening the Group’s economic and financial balance and reinforcing its operating structure. In this context, management discipline represents a key lever to ensure consistency between strategic objectives and operational activities, supporting a gradual strengthening of the Group’s margin profile.

The approach adopted by the Group is also based on an increasing integration between operational activities and management control, with constant attention to the quality of cash flows, process efficiency and the sustainability of decisions over the medium to long term.

Paolo Bona, Chief Executive Officer of Mexedia S.p.A. Società Benefit, commented: “Management discipline represents a central element in the Group’s evolution path. The actions undertaken during the last financial year are aimed at improving operational efficiency and strengthening the economic and financial profile in a sustainable manner. The work initiated requires continuity and discipline in execution, with constant attention to economic and financial balance and the prioritization of operational initiatives, in a context that requires a selective approach and the ability to adapt at an operational level.”

Mexedia intends to continue along this direction, maintaining a focus on operational efficiency, quality of activities and the progressive consolidation of its economic and financial structure, in line with its medium to long-term development objectives.

Forward-Looking Statements (MAR)

This press release may contain forward-looking statements within the meaning of Regulation (EU) No. 596/2014 (“MAR”) and other applicable regulations. The information contained in this press release does not introduce new elements compared to what has already been disclosed in connection with the communication of the 2025 financial results. Such statements reflect expectations and projections regarding future events and the Group’s performance and are subject to risks and uncertainties that may cause actual results to differ materially from those expressed or implied.

About Mexedia

Mexedia S.p.A. Società Benefit is a technology company listed in France on Euronext Growth Paris (ISIN: IT0005450819, ticker: ALMEX) since September 22, 2021, active in technology services and communication solutions. The Group operates internationally and develops industrial models aimed at creating value over the medium to long term. As a Benefit Company, Mexedia combines economic growth objectives with social and environmental impact goals, pursuing sustainable value creation over time.

data.title: Global Feed Pouches Market to Reach USD 1.97 Billion by 2036, Led by Asia Pacific Growth | Key Players: Amcor, Mondi, Berry Global
data.description:
Rising pet ownership and demand for convenient, flexible feed packaging are fueling growth in the global feed pouches market across key regions.

NEWARK, DE / ACCESS Newswire / April 3, 2026 / The global feed pouches market is projected to grow steadily over the next decade, expanding from approximately USD 1.24 billion in 2026 to USD 1.97 billion by 2036, registering a CAGR of 5.3%. According to the latest analysis by Future Market Insights (FMI), growth is being driven by increasing demand for lightweight, convenient, and protective feed packaging solutions across pet nutrition and livestock sectors.

Traditional rigid packaging formats continue to face challenges such as higher material usage, limited convenience, and increased transportation costs. Feed pouches address these limitations through flexible structures, reduced weight, resealable closures, and enhanced barrier protection-making them an increasingly preferred solution for pet feed, livestock feed, and specialty nutrition products.

Feed Pouches Market Snapshot (2026-2036)

  • Market size in 2026: USD 1.24 billion

  • Market size in 2036: USD 1.97 billion

  • CAGR (2026-2036): 5.3%

  • Leading material type: Plastic pouches (~56.4% share)

  • Leading feed type: Pet feed (~41.7% share)

  • Key growth regions: North America, Europe, Asia Pacific

  • Fastest-growing regions: Asia Pacific and emerging markets

Get Access of Report Sample: https://www.futuremarketinsights.com/reports/sample/rep-gb-32564

Market Momentum

The feed pouches market begins at approximately USD 1.24 billion in 2026 and maintains a steady upward trajectory throughout the forecast period. By 2031, increasing adoption in pet food packaging and livestock feed distribution pushes market value beyond USD 1.5 billion.

Between 2031 and 2036, growth strengthens as demand for resealable, high-barrier, and visually appealing packaging formats rises. Advancements in flexible packaging materials and growing emphasis on sustainability further support market expansion. By 2036, the market reaches USD 1.97 billion, sustaining its 5.3% CAGR over the decade.

Why the Market Is Growing

Demand for feed pouches is rising due to their ability to preserve product quality while improving convenience and handling. Feed manufacturers are increasingly adopting pouch formats to reduce packaging weight, lower logistics costs, and enhance shelf appeal.

Growth in pet ownership is a major contributor, particularly in urban markets where consumers prefer resealable and easy-to-store packaging formats. Pet owners value freshness retention and usability, making pouch packaging highly suitable for daily feeding routines.

At the same time, advances in barrier films and closure systems are enabling better protection against moisture, oxygen, and contamination. Material selection is increasingly guided by performance, cost efficiency, and sustainability considerations rather than traditional packaging norms.

Segment Spotlight

  • Material Type: Plastic Pouches Lead with ~56.4% Share
    Plastic-based pouches dominate the market due to their cost efficiency, sealing reliability, and compatibility with high-speed filling processes. Their ability to support multilayer barrier structures further strengthens their position despite sustainability concerns.

  • Feed Type: Pet Feed Anchors Demand (~41.7% Share)
    Pet feed remains the leading application segment, driven by rising pet ownership and growing demand for branded nutrition products. Livestock and aquafeed segments also contribute significantly, particularly in bulk and semi-flexible packaging formats.

  • Closure Type: Zipper Pouches Gain Traction
    Zipper pouches are increasingly preferred due to their resealability and convenience. These formats support repeated usage and help maintain feed freshness, especially in premium and mid-tier pet food products.

Regional Growth: North America, Europe, and Asia Pacific Drive Expansion

North America remains a key market supported by strong demand for pet food and a well-established flexible packaging industry. Europe shows steady growth, driven by sustainability initiatives and increasing focus on recyclable pouch materials.

Asia Pacific is emerging as a high-growth region due to expanding livestock production, rising disposable incomes, and increasing pet adoption. Rapid urbanization and evolving retail structures are further supporting demand for flexible packaging formats.

Drivers, Opportunities, Trends, Challenges

Drivers:

  • Rising pet ownership and premium pet nutrition demand

  • Need for lightweight and cost-efficient packaging

  • Growth in flexible packaging adoption

Opportunities:

  • Development of recyclable and mono-material pouches

  • Innovation in resealable and high-barrier packaging

  • Expansion in emerging markets

Trends:

  • Shift toward sustainable and recyclable pouch materials

  • Increased use of zipper closures for convenience

  • Enhanced shelf appeal through improved graphics and transparency

Challenges:

  • Plastic waste concerns and regulatory pressure

  • Recycling limitations for multilayer materials

  • Raw material cost volatility

Competitive Landscape

The feed pouches market is moderately competitive, with players focusing on material innovation, packaging performance, and usability enhancements. Companies are investing in lightweight structures, improved barrier technologies, and resealable features to meet evolving consumer and industry demands.

Leading manufacturers include Amcor plc, Mondi Group, Sonoco Products Company, Berry Global Inc., Sealed Air Corporation, ProAmpac LLC, Constantia Flexibles, Huhtamaki Oyj, Coveris Holdings S.A., and Winpak Ltd.

These companies compete on packaging durability, barrier performance, sustainability initiatives, and ability to deliver cost-effective solutions for both pet feed and livestock applications. Strategic focus remains on balancing functionality with environmental responsibility as demand for flexible packaging continues to grow.

For an in-depth analysis of evolving formulation trends and to access the complete strategic outlook for the Feed Pouches Market through 2036, visit the official report page at: https://www.futuremarketinsights.com/reports/feed-pouches-market

data.title: Vital Farms, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Contact the DJS Law Group to Discuss Your Rights - VITL
data.description:
Vital Farms, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Contact the DJS Law Group to Discuss Your Rights - VITL

Vital Farms, Inc. Sued for Securities Law Violations - Contact the DJS Law Group to Discuss Your Rights - VITL

PR Newswire

LOS ANGELES, April 3, 2026

LOS ANGELES, April 3, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The DJS Law Group reminds investors of a class action lawsuit against Vital Farms, Inc. ("Vital Farms" or "the Company") (NASDAQ: VITL) for violations of §§10(b) and 20(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 and Rule 10b-5 promulgated thereunder by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

Shareholders who purchased shares of VITL during the class period listed are encouraged to contact the firm regarding possible lead plaintiff appointments. Appointment as lead plaintiff is not required to partake in any recovery.

CLASS PERIOD: May 8, 2025 to February 26, 2026

DEADLINE: May 26, 2026

CASE DETAILS: According to the Complaint, the Company made false and misleading statements to the market. Vital Farms' project to change its enterprise resource planning ("ERP") system caused delays, despite the fact it had downplayed the risk of delays occurring. These ERP delays hindered the Company's performance. Based on these facts, Vital Farm's public statements were false and materially misleading throughout the class period.

If you are a shareholder who suffered a loss, contact us to participate.

WHY DJS LAW GROUP? DJS Law Group's primary focus is to enhance investor return through balanced counseling and aggressive advocacy. We specialize in securities class actions, corporate governance litigation, and domestic/international M&A appraisals. Our clients are some of the largest and most sophisticated hedge funds and alternative asset managers in the world. The litigation claims of our clients are extraordinarily valuable assets that demand respect, focus, and results.

Join the case to recover your losses.

This press release may be considered Attorney Advertising in some jurisdictions under the applicable law and rules of ethics.

LOS ANGELES, April 3, 2026

LOS ANGELES, April 3, 2026 /PRNewswire/ -- The DJS Law Group reminds investors of a class action lawsuit against Gossamer Bio, Inc. ("Gossamer" or "the Company") (NASDAQ: GOSS) violations of §§10(b) and 20(a) of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 and Rule 10b-5 promulgated thereunder by the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.

Shareholders who purchased shares of GOSS during the class period listed are encouraged to contact the firm regarding possible lead plaintiff appointments. Appointment as lead plaintiff is not required to partake in any recovery.

CLASS PERIOD: June 16, 2025 to February 20, 2026

DEADLINE: June 1, 2026

CASE DETAILS: According to the Complaint, the Company made false and misleading statements to the market. Gossamer misled investors by concealing facts about issues with its Phase 3 PROSERA study. Based on these facts, Gossamer's public statements were false and materially misleading throughout the class period.

If you are a shareholder who suffered a loss, contact us to participate.

WHY DJS LAW GROUP? DJS Law Group's primary focus is to enhance investor return through balanced counseling and aggressive advocacy. We specialize in securities class actions, corporate governance litigation, and domestic/international M&A appraisals. Our clients are some of the largest and most sophisticated hedge funds and alternative asset managers in the world. The litigation claims of our clients are extraordinarily valuable assets that demand respect, focus, and results.

Join the case to recover your losses.

This press release may be considered Attorney Advertising in some jurisdictions under the applicable law and rules of ethics.

CONTACT:

David J. Schwartz

Eastchester, NY 10709

data.title: Microsoft to Invest $10 Billion in Japan on AI Infrastructure, Cybersecurity
data.description:
By Kosaku Narioka 




  Microsoft plans to invest $10 billion in Japan over the next four years to develop artificial-intelligence infrastructure with partners and strengthen cybersecurity initiatives. 



  The U.S. technology giant said Friday that the investment plan is aimed at helping advance Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi's goal of improving the nation's economic security and promoting growth investments in advanced technologies. 



  Microsoft said it would team up with internet services providers SoftBank Corp. and Sakura Internet to consider jointly developing AI services to support the development of domestic large language models and other applications. The companies aim to create platforms that compute and store data in Japan, while allowing clients to access the platforms through Microsoft's Azure cloud services. 



  The U.S. company said it would strengthen a tie-up with the country's cybersecurity office and help the government and businesses detect cyberattacks early or preempt them. Microsoft also said it would help train one million engineers and developers by 2030 in cooperation with Japanese companies. 



  The announcement came just days after Microsoft disclosed investment plans for Singapore and Thailand. 



  Earlier this week, Microsoft said it was on track to invest $5.5 billion in cloud and AI infrastructure in Singapore through 2029 as demand for AI computing continues to grow. The U.S. tech giant also said it planned to invest more than $1 billion in Thailand over the next two years. 



  Microsoft, which competes in the cloud and data-center space with the likes of Alphabet, Amazon and Alibaba in Asia, has been ramping up its cloud services in response to a continued AI computing boom. 





  Write to Kosaku Narioka at kosaku.narioka@wsj.com 





  (END) Dow Jones Newswires



  April 03, 2026 01:45 ET (05:45 GMT)
